# Vulkan-1 proxy vs official documentation (vulkan_core.h + vulkan_win32.h)
#
# Generated by: python scripts/compare_vulkan_proxy_to_doc.py --win32 -o docs/vulkan_proxy_vs_doc_report.txt
# Compare proxy (vulkan-1_proxy.cpp) to official Khronos headers only; no spec file.
#
# Summary:
#   - Missing in proxy: APIs in doc but not implemented in proxy (262 in proxy vs 738 in doc).
#   - In proxy not in doc: Likely older/vendor names or typos (e.g. vkCopyImageToImage if present).
#   - Parameter count mismatch: Proxy has wrong number of arguments; fix spec/generator.
#   - Return type mismatch: Proxy return (int/void) does not match doc (void/VkResult/pointer); fix proxy or generator.

Doc APIs: 738
Proxy APIs: 262

## Parameter count mismatch (doc vs proxy)
